title: Operations Workbench
concept: A three-pane Playground interface that keeps creation, saved management, the live WordPress browser, and Site Manager tools visible as one continuous workspace instead of switching between separate overlays.
focus: reduced modal dependence for daily management
flows: preview a Gutenberg PR or branch
import from GitHub after account connection
browse and filter the Blueprint gallery
save to browser storage or a local directory
navigate WordPress paths and refresh the iframe
use Site Manager settings, files, blueprint, database, logs, and export tools
featureCoverage: Blueprint gallery with category filters and search
destructive reset and saved reload behavior
new file, new folder, upload, and browse file controls
